news.title: Solana Policy Institute-backed PAC spends millions to jam Sherrod Brown's Senate run
news.summary: The Sentinel Action Fund is supporting Republican John Husted in that race, with funding from the Solana network's advocacy group and Multicoin Capital.

news.title: Bitcoin capped at $75,000 as Nasdaq and S&P 500 fly to new record highs
news.summary: The Nasdaq was higher for the 11th consecutive session as investors looked past the conflict in the Middle East.

news.title: Justin Sun blasts Trump-linked WLFI's 'absurd' governance vote, escalating feud
news.summary: The Tron founder claimed that dissenters would face token lockups and exclusion from voting, while the project said the proposal aims to align all participants for the long-run.
